name: supergoal

metadata.description: Supergoal turns autonomous coding work into structured, gated, inspectable run artifacts for Claude Code and Codex.

plugins.name: supergoal
plugins.description: Plan and autonomously build a software task end-to-end. One ready-to-paste /goal backed by run.json, event telemetry, evidence files, phase gates, final audit, and report.html. Works on Claude Code and Codex.
